title: cyperus diffusus var. chalaranthus
intro: Cyperus diffusus var. chalaranthus, commonly known as the umbrella sedge, is a type of plant species within the sedge family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as acting as a diuretic. The herbal preparations of Cyperus diffusus var. chalaranthus include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
